side_effects.description: Mild sting at injection site appearing ~1 hour after injection, small red mark, not hard or raised
Whole body chills sensation, described as insides feeling wet with a slight breeze, cold hands and feet, body temperature 96.9-97.3°F
Subtle nausea feeling, not severe enough to vomit
Faint heartbeat sensation / reduced strength of heartbeat, possibly anxiety-related

protocol_notes: First time using GHK-CU at 2mg, injected approximately 1 hour after 3rd Retatrutide injection on opposite love handle. Took Zyrtec (antihistamine) due to suspicion of histamine intolerance reaction. Also drinking electrolytes (Liquid IV). Noted high estrogen as a potential contributing factor to histamine response.
